capabilities.name: manage-profiles
capabilities.description: Creates, edits, lists, duplicates, and deletes band identity profiles for Suno music generation. Supports headless modes: --headless:create, --headless:edit, --headless:load, --headless:delete, --headless:duplicate, --headless:validate.

capabilities.name: analyze-writer-voice
capabilities.description: Extracts writing voice patterns from samples and stores in band profile.

capabilities.name: health-check
capabilities.description: Assesses profile completeness and quality beyond structural validation.
